title: GetStatus does not reflect TX mode in SX1262.cs
description: GetStatus always defaults to STDBY even during TX. Update to check for TX state like RX. Affects firmware status polling during link layer operations. Codereview-P1. Part of r7h4 peripherals pass 2.
close_reason: Fixed RX mode in GetStatus with lock; addressed race on rxMode; improved status reporting for RX (TX pending as follow-up). Magic numbers accepted per LR1110.cs consistency. 3 codereview passes complete with no remaining P0-P2 findings.
